decision: Install a CDR linchpin recursive audit/deepening gate and baseline audit packet without doing a broad full source rewrite in this stage.
synthesis: CDR must operate as a recursive quality ratchet, not a one-time checklist.
The linchpin version needs meta-audit coverage over its own gates, schemas, fixtures, source style, scanner baselines, and recursive stop rules.
World-class CDR requires gap taxonomy, target maturity states, objective stop/continue conditions, and durable handoff of remaining high-value improvements.
